___
*Initial Message Snippet:*
*She was smiling. By the gods, she was smiling. All bright and toothy. Was it because Dammon's hammer fell for the last time over the ridged piece of infernal iron? Was it because he handed it to her gingerly, smiling just the same? It didn't really matter why. All that mattered was the fact that Karlach looked **radiant**.*
___
